item.title: Heavy-Duty Recovery on Unstable Ground
item.description: Unstable terrain adds complexity to an already tough recovery job. How do professionals maintain control in these conditions?

media:content.media:title: Heavy-Duty Recovery on Unstable Ground
media:content.media:description: Unstable terrain adds complexity to an already tough recovery job. How do professionals maintain control in these conditions?

item.title: Truck Incident at a Bridge
item.description: A bridge becomes the scene of a tense recovery. How does Ron Pratt handle the risks of this tricky incident?

media:content.media:title: Truck Incident at a Bridge
media:content.media:description: A bridge becomes the scene of a tense recovery. How does Ron Pratt handle the risks of this tricky incident?

item.title: The Great Jeep Escape
item.description: A tricky situation turns into a successful recovery as a Jeep is carefully maneuvered out. What made this escape

media:content.media:title: The Great Jeep Escape
media:content.media:description: A tricky situation turns into a successful recovery as a Jeep is carefully maneuvered out. What made this escape

item.title: How to Safely Tow with a Blown Wheel Bearing
item.description: Key safety tips and techniques for towing a vehicle with a failed wheel bearing. What precautions help prevent further damage?

media:content.media:title: How to Safely Tow with a Blown Wheel Bearing
media:content.media:description: Key safety tips and techniques for towing a vehicle with a failed wheel bearing. What precautions help prevent further damage?

item.title: Heavy-Duty Recovery on Unstable Ground
item.description: Soft soil and shifting terrain make this recovery a challenge. How does Ron Pratt stabilize the job and get it done?

media:content.media:title: Heavy-Duty Recovery on Unstable Ground
media:content.media:description: Soft soil and shifting terrain make this recovery a challenge. How does Ron Pratt stabilize the job and get it done?

item.title: Loaded Trailer Dropped Off a Fifth Wheel
item.description: A loaded trailer slips off its fifth wheel. What recovery effort gets it back under control?

media:content.media:title: Loaded Trailer Dropped Off a Fifth Wheel
media:content.media:description: A loaded trailer slips off its fifth wheel. What recovery effort gets it back under control?

item.title: Flood Water Bus Rescue
item.description: A bus stranded in rising water requires careful planning and execution to recover safely. How do crews handle recoveries in flooded conditions?

media:content.media:title: Flood Water Bus Rescue
media:content.media:description: A bus stranded in rising water requires careful planning and execution to recover safely. How do crews handle recoveries in flooded conditions?

item.title: Fresh New Truck Gets to Work
item.description: A brand‑new truck hits the road for its first job. How does it perform under pressure?

media:content.media:title: Fresh New Truck Gets to Work
media:content.media:description: A brand‑new truck hits the road for its first job. How does it perform under pressure?

item.title: Inspecting a 2009 Buick Lucerne
item.description: A 2009 Buick Lucerne gets a close look. What does Ron Pratt find during the inspection?

media:content.media:title: Inspecting a 2009 Buick Lucerne
media:content.media:description: A 2009 Buick Lucerne gets a close look. What does Ron Pratt find during the inspection?

item.title: GPS Takes a Muddy Detour
item.description: A wrong turn guided by GPS ends in a muddy situation that needs a recovery. What happens when navigation doesn’t match reality?

media:content.media:title: GPS Takes a Muddy Detour
media:content.media:description: A wrong turn guided by GPS ends in a muddy situation that needs a recovery. What happens when navigation doesn’t match reality?

item.title: Calling for Backup: Three Trucks Stuck
item.description: When one truck gets stuck, sometimes two more follow. This clip shows the challenge of freeing three at once. What’s the biggest multi‑vehicle recovery you’ve witnessed?

media:content.media:title: Calling for Backup: Three Trucks Stuck
media:content.media:description: When one truck gets stuck, sometimes two more follow. This clip shows the challenge of freeing three at once. What’s the biggest multi‑vehicle recovery you’ve witnessed?

item.title: Truck With a Severe Wheel Issue
item.description: A heavy truck recovery deals with major structural damage affecting mobility. Careful planning and equipment are needed to stabilize and move it safely. What would be the first step?

media:content.media:title: Truck With a Severe Wheel Issue
media:content.media:description: A heavy truck recovery deals with major structural damage affecting mobility. Careful planning and equipment are needed to stabilize and move it safely. What would be the first step?
